seoTitle: Oxley vs Oxley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oxley and Oxley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oxley vs Oxley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oxley and Oxley Park.
heading: Oxley vs Oxley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oxley, New South Wales and Oxley Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oxley Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Oxley (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oxley or Oxley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oxley has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Oxley Park scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oxley scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Oxley Park scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oxley or Oxley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oxley Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
